calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof [Probate Code Section 11700]
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court noted that no one is here to object, and that Ms. Jefferson and Mr. Callison are not present. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Entitlement to Estate, etc. (order for the same signed in open Court).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof [Probate Code Section 11700]
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Continued To Jul-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
